text: Claude overstates memory_list frequency — memory_orient is the privileged path, not memory_list
Task namespaces don't corrupt the dashboard — they only pollute the auxiliary namespaces field
The always-on token tax is the conventions blob (~2800 words), not the task listing — conventions are returned unconditionally on every session
Cannot blanket-hide all tasks/* — tasks/admin and active tasks must remain visible
Bundling #4 with #3 is scope drift — they are different classes of work and should not be conflated
Two versions of conventions risk drift — compact summary must be a controlled derivative, not a separate source of truth
